focus: Implement the reproducible full Cranfield export path, document an extensible OpenSearch provider setup, and verify Cloudflare access without exposing secrets or deploying.
reason_started: The operator resolved the prior blocker with instructions to verify Cloudflare, recommend OpenSearch setup, and implement Cranfield ingestion before deployment.
reason_ended: Cranfield export and provider documentation are complete and locally validated; Cloudflare read access is verified; live public acceptance remains blocked on OpenSearch creation, corpus loading, and deployment approval.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: Full local validation passed after Cranfield exporter implementation.

validators_executed.name: npm run export:cranfield
validators_executed.evidence: Public source exported expected Cranfield counts to /private/tmp without credentials or deployment.

validators_executed.name: Cloudflare read-only verification
validators_executed.evidence: Token active, account readable, and Workers services readable; deploy/write scope not proven.

validators_skipped.name: live OpenSearch domain verification
validators_skipped.reason: No domain or OpenSearch users exist yet.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deployment validation
validators_skipped.reason: Deployment and external mutation were not approved.

github_submission.blocker: Changes were left in the working tree for operator review; no explicit commit or push request was made during this blocker-handling turn.

reusable_lessons: Public gzip archives can be auto-decoded by fetch when servers send Content-Encoding; corpus exporters should accept both compressed and decoded archive checksums when the content source is otherwise stable.
downstream_impacts: Central MDE should keep retail-search marked blocked on live OpenSearch provisioning, not on Cranfield source discovery.
content_seeds: Phase 1 article can now include a reproducible Cranfield ingestion note.
evidence_quality_notes: Cranfield public source and parser are verified against expected counts.
Cloudflare was verified only through read-only API calls; deployment readiness still needs write-scope proof or an approved deploy.

supports_mission: Moves Phase 1 from fixture-only data toward reproducible full Cranfield ingestion.
Keeps OpenSearch as the extensible production search provider for later phases.
missing: Live public Worker endpoint and latency measurements.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-002 serves Phase 1 by removing reproducibility blockers without introducing unearned ranking architecture.
